recommendation.sustainableBasis: hyperevm valued at ~90%-util rate not 10.8% spot (on-chain util 91.7% = above target, spike will revert)
constraintsBound: hyperevm thin per MCP so staged
both legs cross-chain: zero fast-liquid/SLA cost

execNote: on-chain Base -150k / HyperEVM +150k observed same session; realized source matched our rec (Base), not production's (vault)

review.note: HyperEVM held ~7-11% (now ~9.05%) vs 9.4% projected; did NOT revert to the 6.6% weekly low. Move net-positive. Confirms valuing at the 90%-util sustainable rate rather than 10.8% spot was correct.
